red_baseline.reason: T021 owns public response-loss and bounded recovery integration contracts; incomplete route behavior belongs to T022.
red_baseline.summary: Final RED: 4/5 recovery tests pass. Missing and expired operation IDs expose one T022-owned gap: MCP returns scope_not_resolved and CLI throws before producing a nested Agent result instead of operation_record_missing_or_expired.

validation.command: node --check <three T021 files>; npm run check
validation.summary: Fault proxy and both recovery suites parse; syntax check passes for 96 JavaScript files.

Final 4/5 pass. Real CLI/MCP response loss, known/lost ID recovery, zero/unique/ambiguous correlation, same-ID reads, digest-shaped input refusal, and indeterminate non-replay pass; missing/expired normalization is the sole failure.

review.evidence: The deterministic proxy drops only the response after the real CLI/MCP process completes; independent finite-task and journal record counters remain one. The final failure captures all four missing/expired CLI/MCP outcomes together and does not weaken expected semantics.

obligation_evidence.evidence: Fault proxies terminate only adapter processes; managed/runtime state and operation journal remain independently durable.
Evidence is scoped to source CLI/stdin MCP processes and isolated current-OS fixtures; no broader runtime claim is made.
Known ID uses get/reconcile; lost ID uses one exact project/operation/task/state/window/limit correlation query; no original mutation is called again.
Same-ID reads return the original input digest and record twice; digest-shaped extra input is rejected without a journal record.
Missing and physically expired records are asserted to fail without creating work; their currently incorrect public mapping is the only RED.
External finite-task receipt and journal record counts never exceed one after dropped responses and all recovery queries.
Zero/multiple correlation outcomes contain no retry authority; unique outcome points only to get/reconcile.
Seeded indeterminate foreground evidence remains indeterminate through real CLI/MCP reconcile and its external counter stays one.
MCP recovery and response-loss evidence traverses official SDK over a JSON-RPC forwarding proxy into the real stdio server.
